# ishosting_vps_ip (Resource)

Manages an IP address on an ISHosting VPS instance. This resource manages the configuration (RDNS, is_main) of an existing IP. IPs are allocated when the VPS is ordered. Destroying this resource will remove the IP from the VPS.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The IP address.
- `protocol` (String) IP protocol: ipv4 or ipv6.
- `vps_id` (String) The VPS instance ID this IP belongs to.

### Optional

- `is_main` (Boolean) Whether this is the main IP for the VPS.
- `rdns` (String) Reverse DNS record for this IP.

### Read-Only

- `gateway` (String) Gateway address.
- `id` (String) Resource ID in the format vps_id/protocol/address.
- `mask` (String) Subnet mask.
